---
title: "Steve Haigh"
subtitle: "Biomedical Sciences M.Res · University of Reading"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: img/profile.jpg
  image-alt: "Photo of Steve Haigh"
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/stevehaigh
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/shaigh
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "#email"
listing:
  - id: latest-post
    contents: blog/posts
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 1
    type: default
    fields: [date, title, description, categories]
---

*Computational biology, viewed from a 30-year software career.*

Software developer of 30 years, now researching biomedical sciences at the University of Reading. My dissertation extends the *wcEcoli* whole-cell modelling framework to build the first computational model of a human platelet, supervised by Dr Mike Fry.

This site collects notes, slide decks, and project write-ups from the intersection of software and wet-lab biology.

## Currently working on

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
#### Whole-cell modelling
Extending *wcEcoli* to build the first computational model of a human platelet.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
#### Simulation infrastructure
Containerised pipelines and Dash-based UIs for exploring high-dimensional simulation output.
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4}
#### Engineering ↔ biology
Bringing software-engineering discipline to computational-biology workflows.
:::

:::

## Now

*Updated May 2026.* Writing up the first-pass platelet Ca²⁺ model results and rebuilding the simulation exploration UI in Dash. Lab-meeting feedback is generating a couple of small follow-up studies worth firming up before dissertation submission.

## Latest post

::: {#latest-post}
:::

See the [Blog](blog/index.qmd) for the full archive, or the [Projects](projects/index.qmd) page for repos and decks.

```{=html}
<a href="/life/" class="glider-hint" aria-label="A small surprise">
  <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
    <g class="phase phase-0">
      <rect x="6"  y="1"  width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="11" y="6"  width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="1"  y="11" width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="6"  y="11" width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="11" y="11" width="4" height="4"/>
    </g>
    <g class="phase phase-1">
      <rect x="1"  y="1"  width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="11" y="1"  width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="6"  y="6"  width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="11" y="6"  width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="6"  y="11" width="4" height="4"/>
    </g>
    <g class="phase phase-2">
      <rect x="11" y="1"  width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="1"  y="6"  width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="11" y="6"  width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="6"  y="11" width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="11" y="11" width="4" height="4"/>
    </g>
    <g class="phase phase-3">
      <rect x="1"  y="1"  width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="6"  y="6"  width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="11" y="6"  width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="1"  y="11" width="4" height="4"/>
      <rect x="6"  y="11" width="4" height="4"/>
    </g>
  </svg>
</a>
<style>
  .glider-hint {
    display: inline-block;
    margin-top: 3rem;
    color: #2ea043;
    opacity: 0.35;
    transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
  }
  .glider-hint:hover { opacity: 1; transform: translate(2px, 2px); }
  .glider-hint svg rect { fill: currentColor; }
  .glider-hint .phase { opacity: 0; }
  .glider-hint .phase-0 { animation: gh-p0 1.6s infinite; }
  .glider-hint .phase-1 { animation: gh-p1 1.6s infinite; }
  .glider-hint .phase-2 { animation: gh-p2 1.6s infinite; }
  .glider-hint .phase-3 { animation: gh-p3 1.6s infinite; }
  .glider-hint:hover .phase { animation-play-state: paused; }
  @keyframes gh-p0 { 0%, 24.9% { opacity: 1; } 25%, 100% { opacity: 0; } }
  @keyframes gh-p1 { 0%, 24.9% { opacity: 0; } 25%, 49.9% { opacity: 1; } 50%, 100% { opacity: 0; } }
  @keyframes gh-p2 { 0%, 49.9% { opacity: 0; } 50%, 74.9% { opacity: 1; } 75%, 100% { opacity: 0; } }
  @keyframes gh-p3 { 0%, 74.9% { opacity: 0; } 75%, 100% { opacity: 1; } }
  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
    .glider-hint .phase { animation: none; }
    .glider-hint .phase-0 { opacity: 1; }
  }
</style>
<script>
(function () {
  const u = "steve", d = "haigh.bio";
  document.querySelectorAll('a[href$="#email"]').forEach(a => {
    a.href = "mailto:" + u + "@" + d;
  });
})();
</script>
```
